rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.040, which governs fentanyl abuse prevention education in schools. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Each school district shall annually provide research-based instruction related to fentanyl abuse prevention and drug poisoning awareness to students in grades 6 through 12.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated subject area (health education curriculum) with no fiscal or operational linkage to homestead exemptions.
